- [ ] New Agent

## Checklist

- [ ] Used the template from `templates/`
- [ ] Frontmatter fields filled in (`name`, `description`, `version`, `author`, `category`, `tags`)
- [ ] File uses kebab-case naming
- [ ] Placed in the correct category folder
- [ ] No sensitive, proprietary, or project-specific info included
- [ ] Tested in Claude Code and works as described
- [ ] Added a row to the correct section in `CATALOG.md`
